assessor_raw: ICD-10 code assignment run 3: fixed label space ensures stable macro-F1 computation. Dual reporting (overall and rare-code stratum) is well-designed. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: ICD-10 code assignment run 3: fixed label space ensures stable macro-F1 computation. Dual reporting (overall and rare-code stratum) is well-designed. Verdict: defense_wins.
